title: CorefAnnotation
description:
A single coref annotation for one sentence (bracket notation format).

Used for injection into `%xcoref` tiers and for backwards-compatible
wire format.

annotation.description: Coreference annotation string in bracket notation, e.g. `"(0, -, (1, 1)"`.

sentence_idx.description: Index into the `sentences` array of the corresponding `CorefBatchItem`.
